nodes.name: 大盆地
nodes.summary: 大盆地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括石鸡、白喉雨燕、American bushtit等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 小种群风险
nodes.summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。

nodes.name: 不列颠哥伦比亚省
nodes.summary: 不列颠哥伦比亚省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联24种鸟类，包括帝雁、雪雁、山翎鹑等24种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Sage thrasher
nodes.summary: Sage thrasher（Sage thrasher，学名 Oreoscoptes montanus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于大盆地、不列颠哥伦比亚省，主要威胁包括小种群风险。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in the regions of western North America, breeding from the Great Basin to southern British Columbia, and migrates south to southern United States and northern Mexico for winter

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in the regions of western North America, breeding from the Great Basin to southern British Columbia, and migrates south to southern United States and northern Mexico for winter

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Reasons for designation are that it is very small population of an estimated 7 to 36 adults, low level of immigration from Washington and Montana, and reduction of sage-brush habitat due to anthropogenic development and fires. In Washington, the Washington Department of Fish & Wildlife (WDFW) consider the sage thrasher as a Species of Greatest Conservation Need under the State Wildlife Action Plan and identified as a Priority Species under the WDFW's Priority Habitat and Species Program. Conservation concerns include declining population and range reduction occupied by the species
